titleStmt.title: SII 15.96: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 96. (B.K. No. 201 of 1928-29.) AṆṆIGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Hanumantadēva temple.
This record is dated the 2nd regnal year of the king, Īśvara, Pushya ba. 8, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1157 A.D., December 25, Wednesday f.d.t. °11.

It records a gift of land to the god Dhōrēśvara of Aṇṇigeṟe, known as Dakshiṇa-Vāraṇāsi, for worship and repairs, by Daṇḍanāyaka Śrīdharayya, the Perggaḍe of Beḷvala-nāḍu, in conjunction with his ministerial officials. The epigraph gives a brief account of the donor's family and describes Aṇṇigeṟe as the rājadhāni-paṭṭaṇa (chief town) of Beḷvala.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jādhinātha bandhura girisutāghanakucōdghakuṁkumasphurada .
. vṛtta . Ādi rāpuṭamaṁ bhujāsiyaṁbudhi nakhāgradiṁ tiṟidu
rātiya vipuḷājiraṁgadoḷkedaṟi viḷāsama dele kadana pracaṁḍanaṁ kadana doḷāṁparātinṛparā
¨rggaḷara bijjaṇa bhūmipāḷanaṁ . parabhūpāḷara jayalakṣmīkānteyaṁ taṁna tōḷveragiṁ ḷkoḷigoṁḍu
sādaraṁ tānidaccari vidviḍnṛpa kuṁbhakuṁbha . bhīkarabhujaṁ bi
jjakṣamāpāḷakaṁ . © svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁjara puravarādhīsvaraṁ suva¨rṇna
vṛṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatū¨ryyani¨rgghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷacuriya kuḷakamaḷa mā¨rttaṇḍaṁ kadanapracaṁḍaṁ mānakanakā
caḷaṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ gajasāmantaṁ śaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjaraṁ pratāpalaṁkē svaraṁ vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ paranārī
sahōdaraṁ śanivārasiddhi giridu¨rggamallaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ nāmādi samastaprasasi sahitaṁ śrīmadbhuja baḷaca
krava¨rtti tribhuvanamalla bijjaladēva vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddha mānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttami
re tatpāda padmōpajīvi . vṛtta . Anavadyākṛti saṁmōhanaṁ dānama¨rtthinikāyēpsita kā¨ryyasiddhinu
ḍi sāphalyōktisanmaṁtra śaktinitāntajanā manucāritra mātmīya va ṇḍa� māḍittene tatprabhāvadesadaṁ
daṁḍādhipa śrīdharaṁ . vacana . Ā maha nubhāvana vaṁśāvatāramentene . vṛtta . nutaśāṁḍilya gōtrajaḷadhibyābhāsipū
¨rṇnēṁduvistṟutapuṇyaṁ jayabhaṭṭanā vibhuvadhūratnaṁ tpatibrate jayūṁ bike tattanūjanatuḷaṁ satkī¨rttigaṁgānima
jjita dikkuṁjaranaprata¨rkkyamahimaṁ daṁḍādhipaṁ śrīdharaṁ . Ā vibhugagrajanakhilō¨rbbīvinuta daṁḍanātha rāṇugi
diṭadiṁ bhāvikuṁ tanujātaṁ dēva viśada kī¨rtti lakṣmaṇadēva Avaroḍa huṭṭidaḷavanī bhuvanastuta siriyadēvi tat
priyakāntaṁ viśadeyaśaṁ kavinutanānaṁdabhaṭṭadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . Ānaṁdabhaṭṭa tanayaṁ bhūnuta vā[¨rṣṇē]yagōtra nīra
jamitraṁ tāna kali tāne śuci sale tāne maha vēsugidēvaṁ . vacana Ā vīrāgragaṇya jananī sahōda
raṁ . vṛtta . sthirasatyavratadiṁ yudhiṣṭhirananā¨rppiṁ ka¨rṇna ropaviḷādisa murahara prōdbhota
paṁ mṛgāṁka vara ni¨rbbhara puṇyōdayanaprata¨rkyamahimaṁ daṇḍādhipaṁ śrī
dharaṁ . kaṁda . yenippa bhāgaladēviyumā mahlaṇidēviyumu¨rvvī vinutanatuḷa siddhugidēvaṁge
viḷāsavati tiyar . vṛtta . śrīvadhuventu viṣṇuge gaṅgāvadhuventu mahēśvaraṁge vāṇīvadhuve
ntu nīrajabhavaṁge manaḥpriyeyannirantaraṁ bhāvisuvante siddhugicamūpatigudgha mahatva mahlaṇidēvi ma
naḥ priye pramade tānene kaṇgesedaḷdharitriyoḷu . mattaṁ . parabhūpāḷāgradaṁḍādhipamada śikhiyaṁ naṁdisuttuṁ
nijādhīśvararājya śrīlatā manodavisuttuṁ ja�stōmaṁ bittaradindaṁ va¨rddhisuttuṁ parivudeḷeyoḷante
ttaluṁ santataṁ śrīdhara daṁḍādhīśadō¨rmmaṁḍaḷika karāḷā nāṁtājaḷaughavacana . Adalladeyuṁ . vṛtta . va
nadhiparītabhūtaḷasamudbhava lakṣmige mukaraṁ nirantaraṁ namoppamanāḷva dhāriṇi
jananutamāda beḷvalakke saṁda nega¨rtte neṭṭa ramaṇīyamaṇnigeṟe sa¨rvvajanōdgha sukhapradā
yakaṁ . vacana . Ā paṭṭaṇadoḷ . vṛtta . gāvuṇḍava¨rggaṁ vidhṛtabahukaḷānīka bhūdēvava¨rggaṁ purava¨rggaṁ matta
mu¨rvvīstutanagaramumudyadguṇa¨rttaṁtuvāya śau¨ryyadhu¨ryya¨rppara mahitarenaltējapuṇya
prabhāvōddhuratējaṟpuṁja māgātriva¨rggaṁ . vacana . Ā triva¨rggakke jaṁga
mavajraprākāramenisi . kaṁda . mādhava koṇḍaṁ tantuvāyā nvayameṁbuda
dharādhara śikharadoḷudayisidaṁ bija nudayādityaṁ . vacana . Ā manuja puṇḍarīkana
bhujādaṇḍake maṇḍaḷāgra muṁ negaṟḍa kuṁnula boppula kāḷasēnareṁba
rī biruda¨rkkaḷoḷprathita vīrabheṭa[¨rkkaḷ] dore pāṭi kāminī para
ra paṭṭasāliga¨rpparabaḷabhīmararijanaka stutaraṁ . vacana . Antu parama niratiśayame
nisi . kanda . bittarisidaṇnigeṟeyoḷati tāne modalene pesa¨rvvettittu girijēśabhavanai
kōttama dhōrēśvaraṁ puraṁ budhaniḷayaṁ . kēśa vēśvaraṁ viśvadharāstuta ṇēśva
raṁ saṁgatiyiṁ rāṇēśvaraṁ samantivu saṁtataṁ . paramaśōbhākaramāda puravaradoḷ . vṛtta . ni
ravadya¨rvvahudēvaputrara nikāyaṁ baṁṭara naṁṭa¨rssale paṭṭasāli garu ttama śrī
dharasthita dhōrēśvara pādapaṁkēruha bhṛṁga¨rvvīravairibrajōddhura mattadvipasiṁharā meseda¨rssāsi¨rvvaru
¨rvvīsutar . vacana . Antu yapattana dēśādhinātha śrīdharacamū nātha vipuḷādhikāralakṣmī
nitaṁbinigana¨rgghyamaṇibhoṣaṇaṁgaḷenisi . vṛtta . sthiracittaṁ [bhīmarājaṁ patihitanirataṁ boppadēvaṁ dharitrīdhara
dhai¨ryyaṁ sōmanāthaṁ nirupamamahimaṁ dhareyaṁ sadguṇāḷaṁkaraṇaṁgaḷbeḷvala śrīgupa karaṇacayaṁ
tāmenalcelvuvetta karaṇaṁgaḷnālvaru sākṣara kī¨rṇna kaḷpāvanījar . © svasti śrīmattri
bhuvanamalla bijjaṇadēvava¨rṣada 2 neya Īśvara saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa 8 budhavāra vutta rāya
ṇasaṁkramaṇadandu śrī manmahāpradhānaṁ beḷvalanāḍa pe¨rggaḍe daṁḍanāyaka śrīdharayyaṁ gaḷu śrī
karaṇa rājādhyakṣa bhīvaṇayyanāyakaruṁ boppaṇayyanāyakaruṁ sōvaṇayyanāya
karuṁ vēsugināyakaruṁ pramukhavāgi beḷvalanāḍaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasuddhiyiṁ sukhasaṁ kathā vinōdadi
nāḷuttamiṟdu śrīmaddakṣiṇa vāraṇāsi śrī dhōrēsvaradēva¨rgge dēvara pū¨rvva taḷa vṛttiya po[®diṁ] brahma
puriyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu maṁṭūra baṭṭeyiṁ teṁkalu sāleyara kēsiyaṇnana keyyiṁdaṁ paḍu valu
sōviseṭṭiya keyyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu catussīmāsaṁśuddhiyiṁ dēvaraṁgabhōga dēgulada jī¨rṇnōddhāra
khaṁḍasphuṭitakkaṁ śrīmadrājadhānipaṭṭaṇavaṇnigeṟeya 33 gēṇu gaḍiṁbara gaḷeyoḷaḷedu sa¨rvva
bādhāparihāramāge dhārā[pū¨rvvakaṁ] māḍi biṭṭa mattaru 20 Intī dha¨rmmamanārō ¨rvvaru dēśā
dhikārigaḷuṁ nāḍa karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ puruṣaruṁ samayaṁgaḷuṁ paripāḷi suvaru .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō dharāṁ ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . kaṁda . jananuta sāsi¨rvvari keykoṁḍa niśaṁ bhīvaṇa
vibudhaṁ manamosadoḍe gaḷa . bhūvinute llaradēvaṁ jī¨rnnōjanāta
nātmajanā sadbhāvadiṁ kaṇḍarisidanā kī¨rtti nirupamaṁ rājōvajaṁ . © ©
